title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 -  26 - 2018: Gunna start exercising

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder about his decision to start exercising again, explaining that he's been feeling sluggish and toxic from inactivity despite no acute physical pain. He outlines a plan to ride his stationary bike while listening to music (transitioning to audiobooks later), discusses training for a triathlon, and reflects on the mental 'flip switch' needed to prioritize exercise over working on his website.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Needs to start again; feels generally toxic and unwell without it
Can ride high but can't push heart rate too high; may need to switch to edibles or eventually quit to get fit
They compete for mental dominance; exercise must become the dominant mindset for both to work
Combining audiobooks with cycling is complementary and exponentially beneficial, not zero-sum like website vs riding
Wants to do triathlons because knee and calf issues limit running and pure cycling
Generally good but waits too long to eat; plans cheap canned vegetables with protein powder on rides when broke
Exercise naturally leads to better overall life upkeep like diet, cleanliness, and routine

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to start exercising because I was getting distracted on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I was riding my bike last summer and before, I wasn't thinking about my website because I was distracted.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This morning I was working on my website and started thinking about exercising because I was doing RAM at the gym.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel good physically, but I generally don't feel good when I'm not exercising, like I'm toxic.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm hungry a lot because I wait too long to eat, even though my diet is pretty good.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My website is coalescing, meaning the way I work on it is becoming more rewarding with less effort.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can now get a sense of accomplishment from my website with fewer hours of work because it's at a higher level of development.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I could add words to a page a day and that would significantly improve my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My idea for the world is that everybody gets paid by the rich guy Bethesus and the government to ride bicycles and listen to audiobooks while exercising.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to ride my bike to groovy tunes and experiment with edibles because they don't affect my lungs like smoking does.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can exercise high, but I can't get my heart rate over 130 or 140 when I'm high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I should focus on sports now rather than just sitting at my computer because I could get more money from Patreon that way.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If I'm broke, I plan to eat canned vegetables with powdered protein and splooge out of toothpaste canisters because they're cheap.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's empowering to live a productive life spending no money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not a morning person; I usually stay up until the sun comes up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can motivate myself to ride my bike by doing a flip switch in my mentality.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Working on my website and exercising conflict with each other; one has to be dominant.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If exercising is dominant, my website work will naturally fit around it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do a triathlon because I can't run due to my calf burns, but I have a pool and a reservoir nearby.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to be the best at triathlon and chase that goal to stay motivated.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I predict I'll burn out on music while exercising, which is when I'll switch to audiobooks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Listening to audiobooks while exercising is a complementary activity that leads to exponential growth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to do bi-weekly history tests where I spend an hour reviewing random decades and upload them to YouTube.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to start a movement where everyone does history tests and gets paid for it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Exercising gives me a sense of accomplishment that helps me relax and focus on other life maintenance tasks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I work on my website all the time, I neglect other aspects of my life like cleanliness and maintenance.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Exercising helps me maintain my life better, which in turn helps me work on my website.
